name: lemon juice powder
description: Dried lemon juice providing acidity and natural citrus flavor to food products
raw_text: Pudding Cake: Sugar, powdered sugar, water, corn starch, corn syrup, high fructose corn syrup, food starch - modified, agar, guar gum, potassium sorbate (as preservative), citric acid, honey, pectin, phosphoric acid, sodium benzoate (as preservative), dextrose, natural and artificial flavor, maltodextrin, carrageenan, locust bean gum, dextrin, lemon peel, lemon puree, lemon juice concentrate, yellow 5, ascorbic | Orange cranberry crunch salad: Corn flour, enriched wheat flour [wheat flour, niacin, reduced iron, thiamine mononitrate, riboflavin, folic acid], salt, corn starch, spices, paprika, garlic powder, extractives of paprika, with not more than 2% of calcium silicate added to prevent caking), mandrin oranges (mandarin orange segments, water and sugar), dried cranberries (cranberries, sugar, sunflower oil), carrots, radicchio, chow  | Real cheddar cheese & pimentos in a crispy coating bites, cheddar cheese & pimentos: Sugar, water, apple cider vinegar, red bell pepper puree (red bell pepper, water, citric acid), onion, pectin, xanthan gum, citric acid, beet juice concentrate, natural flavor.
